flows.name: Quick experience create / result
flows.steps: Tab / Shift+Tab / Enter / Space / Esc coverage to be recorded.
flows.focus_order: Expected focus order and observed deviations to be recorded.
flows.issues: Record none, issue IDs, or blocker reason.

flows.name: Case list
flows.steps: Tab / filter / open / empty or error state coverage to be recorded.
flows.focus_order: Expected focus order and observed deviations to be recorded.
flows.issues: Record none, issue IDs, or blocker reason.

flows.name: Case detail / judgment detail
flows.steps: Navigation, tabs, CTA, back, and status region coverage to be recorded.
flows.focus_order: Expected focus order and observed deviations to be recorded.
flows.issues: Record none, issue IDs, or blocker reason.

flows.name: Notifications
flows.steps: Open, primary action, snooze, dismiss, empty, and error state coverage to be recorded.
flows.focus_order: Expected focus order and observed deviations to be recorded.
flows.issues: Record none, issue IDs, or blocker reason.

flows.name: Chat room
flows.steps: Composer, send, reply preview, request analysis, stream status, and error coverage to be recorded.
flows.focus_order: Expected focus order and observed deviations to be recorded.
flows.issues: Record none, issue IDs, or blocker reason.

flows.name: Auth login / register / forgot password
flows.steps: Credential fields, validation errors, submit, links, and focus return coverage to be recorded.
flows.focus_order: Expected focus order and observed deviations to be recorded.
flows.issues: Record none, issue IDs, or blocker reason.

flows.name: Admin login
flows.steps: Credential fields, submit, validation errors, and loading state coverage to be recorded.
flows.focus_order: Expected focus order and observed deviations to be recorded.
flows.issues: Record none, issue IDs, or blocker reason.

flows.name: Admin ops jobs
flows.steps: Filters, table/list, sampled state, forbidden state, and error state coverage to be recorded.
flows.focus_order: Expected focus order and observed deviations to be recorded.
flows.issues: Record none, issue IDs, or blocker reason.

runs.observations: Headings, landmark navigation, control names, status updates, validation errors, and focus changes to be recorded.
runs.issues: Record none, issue IDs, or blocker reason.

surfaces.name: Modal / dialog interactions
surfaces.coverage: Dialog open, initial focus, focus trap, close button, Esc close, and focus return to trigger.
surfaces.keyboard_behavior: Record Tab / Shift+Tab / Enter / Space / Esc behavior and any focus loss.
surfaces.screen_reader_behavior: Record announced dialog name, role, description, focus changes, and close state.
surfaces.issues: Record none, issue IDs, or blocker reason.

surfaces.name: Dropdown / menu interactions
surfaces.coverage: Menu trigger, item navigation, submenu or checkbox/radio item if present, close behavior, and focus return.
surfaces.keyboard_behavior: Record Enter / Space / Arrow keys / Esc behavior and tab boundary handling.
surfaces.screen_reader_behavior: Record trigger name/state, menu role, item names, selected/checked state, and close announcements.
surfaces.issues: Record none, issue IDs, or blocker reason.

surfaces.name: Toast / status feedback
surfaces.coverage: Success, warning, error, and async status feedback for user-triggered actions.
surfaces.keyboard_behavior: Record whether toast actions or dismiss controls are reachable without trapping focus.
surfaces.screen_reader_behavior: Record live-region or status announcement behavior and whether duplicate announcements occur.
surfaces.issues: Record none, issue IDs, or blocker reason.

surfaces.name: Evidence upload flow
surfaces.coverage: File picker trigger, validation error, upload progress, preview/remove, and successful upload feedback.
surfaces.keyboard_behavior: Record trigger reachability, remove controls, progress readability, and post-upload focus behavior.
surfaces.screen_reader_behavior: Record control names, file validation messages, progress/status announcements, and uploaded item names.
surfaces.issues: Record none, issue IDs, or blocker reason.

surfaces.name: Form validation errors
surfaces.coverage: Auth, quick input, chat composer, case creation, and Admin credential/config forms.
surfaces.keyboard_behavior: Record submit, error focus or summary behavior, field correction, and resubmit.
surfaces.screen_reader_behavior: Record error announcement, field association, and recovery after correction.
surfaces.issues: Record none, issue IDs, or blocker reason.

surfaces.name: Async loading / stream status
surfaces.coverage: AI generation, chat request analysis, judgment loading, Admin jobs loading, and long-running actions.
surfaces.keyboard_behavior: Record disabled controls, focus stability, cancel/retry controls, and completion focus behavior.
surfaces.screen_reader_behavior: Record loading/status announcements, completion announcements, and repeated update noise.
surfaces.issues: Record none, issue IDs, or blocker reason.

surfaces.name: Error / recovery states
surfaces.coverage: Route errors, API errors, permission denied, expired session, upload failure, and retry paths.
surfaces.keyboard_behavior: Record retry/back/home actions, focus placement after error, and recovery path.
surfaces.screen_reader_behavior: Record error heading/status announcement, actionable control names, and recovery result.
surfaces.issues: Record none, issue IDs, or blocker reason.

surfaces.name: Remaining route / state matrix
surfaces.coverage: Manual spot-check of states not covered by automated route-level axe baseline, including empty, data, forbidden, loading, and destructive confirmation states.
surfaces.keyboard_behavior: Record sampled state list, traversal path, focus order, and any skipped reason.
surfaces.screen_reader_behavior: Record heading/landmark/control-name findings for sampled states and any skipped reason.
surfaces.issues: Record none, issue IDs, or blocker reason.

artifacts.path: docs/核心開發文件/90-證據與盤點/環境與發版驗證/replace-with-real-a11y-manual-artifact
